policy: SteelOx Cloud Phase 2 Static Mirror Policy
rules: Public Pages hosts static artifacts only.
No secrets, tokens, installer scripts, or runtime credentials are published.
TGDK sat records are logical TGDK-controlled resolver records unless separately documented.
Carrier and satellite networks are transport only.
Live writes remain local-first through CloudSwarm or authorized TGDK endpoints.
Jeopardized logical nodes are quarantined, resealed, rotated, or restored by manifest policy.
